jobs.name: Daily Memory Review
jobs.task: Review today's memory files in memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Extract key decisions, lessons learned, and important context. Update MEMORY.md with anything worth keeping long-term. Remove stale or outdated entries from MEMORY.md.

jobs.name: System Health Check
jobs.task: Run a health check: verify all agent configs are valid JSON, check disk space, verify services are responsive, check for any error logs. Report issues to the orchestrator.

jobs.name: Weekly Expense Summary
jobs.task: Generate a weekly expense summary from the invoice-manager service. Include: total spent, by category, overdue invoices, and any anomalies. Report to the orchestrator for Yair.

jobs.name: Gateway Health Probe
jobs.task: Run openclaw health and openclaw doctor. Check disk space with df -h and memory with free -m. If any CRITICAL issues are found, write them to memory with timestamp and severity. Only report if issues are found — skip if all healthy.

jobs.name: Daily Cost Snapshot
jobs.task: Run openclaw gateway usage-cost and save the output to memory under a Daily Cost Snapshot heading. Include total cost, token count, and per-agent breakdown if available. Compare with yesterday's snapshot and flag any unusual spikes (>2x increase). If daily cost exceeds $5 flag as warning, if >$20 flag as critical.

jobs.name: Morning News Brief
jobs.task: Summarize the top 5 news stories relevant to the user's interests and deliver a concise morning brief.

jobs.name: Weekly Learning Review
jobs.task: Run workspace/scripts/learning-review.sh to generate the weekly learning review report. Review the output in memory/learning-review-YYYY-MM-DD.md. If any agent score is below 50, escalate to the orchestrator immediately. Summarize key findings.
